summary: Conduct structured customer discovery to validate problem-solution fit through interviews, synthesis, and hypothesis testing.

inputs.name: problem_hypothesis
inputs.description: The problem hypothesis to validate with customers.

inputs.name: target_segment
inputs.description: Description of the target customer segment to interview.

inputs.name: interview_count_target
inputs.description: Target number of interviews to conduct.

outputs.name: interview_guide
outputs.description: Structured interview guide following Mom Test methodology.

outputs.name: findings_report
outputs.description: Synthesized findings across all interviews with patterns.

outputs.name: hypothesis_validation
outputs.description: Clear validation or invalidation of the problem hypothesis.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is customer discovery, not market research or survey design.
Require problem hypothesis and target segment before designing interviews.
Findings must clearly validate or invalidate the hypothesis with evidence.

steps.action: Frame testable hypotheses from the problem statement.
Create structured interview guide following Mom Test principles.
Plan participant recruitment from target segment.
Synthesize interview findings and identify patterns.
Produce validation report with evidence-based conclusions.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read existing business documents, metrics, and prior analysis.

verification.method: Check interview guide has open-ended, non-leading questions.
Check findings are synthesized across interviews, not individual summaries.
Check clear validate/invalidate verdict with supporting evidence.

success_criteria: Interview guide follows Mom Test methodology.
Findings are synthesized across interviews with clear patterns.
Hypothesis validation verdict is evidence-based and actionable.

rollback.when: If outputs invent metrics or misrepresent findings, roll back to raw inputs.
